title: Latency, Concurrency, Rate and Spend Limits, Context Cache, and Load · Behavior Case: Rate Spend Budget
summary: The agent parallelizes every request, queues without limit, retries 429s immediately, caches sensitive context indefinitely, and estimates capacity from one local happy path. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the rate spend budget increment in budgeted agent capacity and overload controller. Learners progress through prediction, expli…

Bound sessions, provider calls, tool calls, per-tenant work, queues, task groups, connection pools, and downstream effects with fair admission.

"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-rate-spend-budget — Enforce project and tenant requests, tokens, daily and rolling spend, retry, model, and tool budgets before work starts and while it runs.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-performance-concurrency-cache-5
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-performance-concurrency-cache-5.
# Case 9036: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def worked_agentpy_performance_concurrency_cache_5(requests: int = 120, completed_requests: int = 114, rejected_overload: int = 6, cache_hits: int = 32, budget_breaches: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorityworked5",
        "interaction9036",
        "tool5dekrow",
        "stateworked59036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if requests < 20 or completed_requests < 0 or rejected_overload < 0:
        return False, requests, "load-count"
    if completed_requests + rejected_overload != requests:
        return False, completed_requests, "load-reconciliation"
    if cache_hits < 0 or cache_hits > completed_requests:
        return False, cache_hits, "cache-accounting"
    if budget_breaches > 0:
        return False, budget_breaches, "resource-budget-breach"
    assert completed_requests + rejected_overload == requests and budget_breaches == 0
    return True, completed_requests, "bounded-agent-capacity"
